concept.description: Labels all types annotated with "@org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.FeignClient" with "Spring", "Client", "Feign", and "Injectable".
concept.cypher: MATCH (feignClient:Type)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->()-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type) WHERE annotationType.fqn = "org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.FeignClient" SET feignClient:Spring:Feign:Client:Injectable RETURN feignClient as FeignClient

concept.description: Labels all types that are referenced via the configuration attribute of "@org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.FeignClient" with "Spring", "Configuration", "Component", "Injectable", and "Feign".
concept.cypher: MATCH (feignClient:Spring:Feign:Client)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(annotation:Java:Annotation), (annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type {fqn: "org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.FeignClient"}), (annotation)-[:HAS]->()-[:CONTAINS]->()-[:IS]->(feignConfiguration:Java:Type) SET feignConfiguration:Spring:Feign:Configuration:Component:Injectable RETURN feignConfiguration AS FeignConfiguration
